div.p: (Mr. Rockhill reports that the Austrian claim for war expenses to May 1 is stated at 13,200,000 crowns; 520,000 crowns additional for each month thereafter. Private claims about 21,000 taels.
He is unofficially informed that Russia will demand, inclusive of railroad claims, £17,500,000. Japan will ask 45,000,000 yen. France will ask 280,000,000 francs. Belgium, 30,000,000 francs.
He will, until otherwise instructed, insist upon scaling, but does not believe it will be agreed to.)
